name: whatsapp-rust-bridge
description: A high-performance utilities for WhatsApp, powered by Rust and WebAssembly.
author: João Lucas <jlucaso@hotmail.com>

scripts.bench: bun run build && bun run benches/binary.ts && bun run benches/signal.ts && bun run benches/curve.ts && bun run benches/crypto.ts
scripts.bench:node: bun run build && node --expose-gc benches/binary.ts && node --expose-gc benches/signal.ts && node --expose-gc benches/curve.ts && node --expose-gc benches/crypto.ts
scripts.gen:types: cd codegen && cargo run --target $(rustc -vV | grep host | cut -d' ' -f2) 2>/dev/null > ../types/generated.d.ts
scripts.build: bun run build:wasm && bun run build:ts && bun run postbuild
scripts.build:dev: bun run build:wasm:dev && bun run build:ts && bun run postbuild
